nodes.label: AI as backup for low-energy days
nodes.label_negative: Struggling through low-energy days without AI
nodes.grounding_span: if I'm not feeling great or don't have energy to think, which happens at least 1 day a week, I'll use AI in part for all of it

nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: working collaboratively with anything more creative

nodes.label: AI as direct task handoff for routine work
nodes.label_negative: AI requiring iterative collaboration for routine work
nodes.grounding_span: typically with cold emails I ask for something with specific perimeters and the first response I copy and paste and use

nodes.label: Maintaining personal authenticity in AI-assisted content
nodes.grounding_span: I want it to feel personal. I don't ever want someone to view our company account and be able to tell it was AI

nodes.label: AI as aid requiring human direction
nodes.grounding_span: I think the AI needs me to operate it for these tasks so I don't actively consider it taking over my job

nodes.label: Concealing AI use from older bosses
nodes.label_negative: Openly using AI with boss approval
nodes.grounding_span: I don't make a show of using it in front of the owners, mostly because I want them to think I'm doing all of my work myself

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and creative expression

nodes.label: Professional efficiency and reduced effort
